====''[[Pokémon Journeys: The Series]]''====
In ''[[JN065|Thrash of the Titans!]]'', {{an|Iris}} was confirmed to be the current Champion of the Unova League, indicating that Alder no longer holds the title.

In ''[[JN117|The Fiery Road to Mastership!]]'', Alder was shown watching Iris's [[Masters Eight Tournament]] match against Cynthia. During said match, Iris mentioned her {{TP|Iris|Haxorus}} having finished the battle that made her Champion, possibly indicating she defeated Alder to earn her title.
